keywords.aiIde: 人工智能集成开发环境

metadata.openGraphDescription: Skillpacks、Sano Shield、Safe Diff 和真实存储库的协调代理。
metadata.twitterDescription: 将存储库转变为安全的 AI 代理工作区。

hero.kicker: 用于真正开发的 AI IDE
hero.headline: 缩小人工智能和生产存储库之间的差距。
hero.description: Oclushion 将任何存储库转变为 AI 代理的安全工作区：智能上下文、技能包、Sano Shield、Safe Diff、看板和企业审计。

mock.safeDiff: Safe Diff：3 个提案被隔离

product.headline: 专业氛围编码的完整环境。
product.description: 这不是编辑器内的聊天。它是 Claude、OpenAI、OpenRouter、Ollama 和本地模型之上的执行、上下文和安全层。

items.title: Sano Shield - Native AI Privacy
items.copy: Tokenizes emails, API keys, credit cards, and access tokens before data leaves your machine. Active in chat, agents, voice, MCP context, and terminal output.

items.title: Dual Terminal - You and the Agent, Separated
items.copy: Two isolated terminals in one panel: yours is fully interactive and multi-tab, while the AI terminal is read-only output you can watch and interrupt with Ctrl+C.

items.title: Persistent Multi-Chat History
items.copy: Every chat session is stored in local SQLite, grouped by date, and never auto-deleted. The AI can spawn sub-chats for parallel agent workloads.

items.title: Safe Diff + Fast Apply + Instant Revert
items.copy: Every AI proposal becomes a reviewable diff. Accept, reject, explain, write to disk with RAM snapshots, and instantly revert protected changes.

items.title: Role-Based Agents with File Ownership
items.copy: Architect, Builder, Reviewer, Security, QA, and Docs agents run sequentially or in parallel while file ownership locks prevent write conflicts.

items.title: Skillpack Marketplace - Verified Behaviors
items.copy: Install SHA-256 verified AI behaviors scoped by role, then inject them directly into the prompt builder as active workspace rules.

items.title: Voice Input + Prompt Enhancer
items.copy: Speak instructions through Whisper with Sano Shield active, then turn rough prompts into precise, stack-aware instructions.

items.title: Kanban to Agent Handoff
items.copy: Create tasks in the built-in Kanban board and hand them to the Agent Orchestrator. Completed work returns as Safe Diff proposals.

items.title: Multiplayer Collaboration
items.copy: Real-time collaborative workspace powered by Yjs and y-websocket with presence awareness for teams and AI-assisted workflows.

items.title: Deploy + Rollback from the IDE
items.copy: Push to git, trigger Vercel or GitHub Actions deploys, run health checks, and rollback without leaving Oclushion.

features.headlinePrefix: The AI IDE stack built for
features.description: Oclushion brings privacy, agent execution, persistent context, reviewable changes and deployment workflows into one desktop IDE.

workflow.headline: 从任务到批准的变更，没有混乱。

steps.title: Open repo
steps.copy: Select a local repository and let Oclushion scan the structure.

steps.title: Choose profile
steps.copy: Activate the skillpack that matches the work you want done.

steps.title: Sanitize context
steps.copy: Sano Shield masks secrets before context reaches a model.

steps.title: Review diff
steps.copy: Safe Diff shows proposed code and commands before applying them.

steps.title: Apply or revert
steps.copy: Approve changes, run checks and revert quickly when needed.

workflow.headlinePrefix: From repo context to approved change,

security.headline: 人工智能绝不会偶然收到秘密。
security.description: Sano Shield detects common secrets and sensitive values in prompts and context before data is sent to external AI providers.
benefits: Keeps original values local for restoration
Records security-relevant actions in the audit trail

pricing.headline: Clear plans to go from trial to production.
pricing.description: The landing reflects the current business model: Free for trying the IDE, Pro for advanced local AI workflows, and Teams/Enterprise for shared controls and audit.

free.name: Free
free.description: For testing Oclushion locally with essential AI workspace protection.

pro.name: Pro
pro.description: For solo developers who want voice, Fast Apply, richer context and advanced automation.

teams.name: Teams / Enterprise
teams.description: For organizations that need shared policies, audit visibility and enterprise controls.

features.liveGod: Live Preview and God Mode gates

cta.headline: Use the IDE locally, protect your context and approve every AI change.

structuredData.description: 用于真实存储库、技能包、Sano Shield、Safe Diff、多代理和企业审计的 AI 桌面 IDE。
features: MCP 与 GitHub、Linear 和 Notion

showcase.headline: Quarantine every change before it touches production.
showcase.headlinePrefix: Quarantine every change before it touches
showcase.description: AI output is not written blindly. Oclushion separates conversational answers from proposed code and commands, then routes them into Safe Diff for human approval.

steps.title: Code proposals are isolated
steps.copy: Generated code blocks become reviewable proposals instead of automatic writes.

steps.title: Commands stay quarantined
steps.copy: Shell commands wait for explicit approval before execution.

steps.title: Fast Apply keeps rollback state
steps.copy: Approved edits can be applied quickly while retaining revert data.

steps.title: Audit records the action
steps.copy: Approvals, rejects and command runs are written to the local audit trail.

footer.copyright: Copyright 2026 Oclushion. AI workspace security and developer automation.
footer.bottomLeft: Built around privacy and controlled AI changes.
footer.noteCopy: Oclushion currently includes the landing page, desktop IDE shell, native auth, Sano Shield, Safe Diff, real repository context, skillpacks, model routing, marketplace, audit and pricing gates.
